project.title: Pebbles
project.description: Pebbles is an atomic diary app allowing to record memories and enrich them with emotions, instants, thoughts, related to people and get weekly and monthly wraps.

maps.title: Recording loop
maps.description: The core capture journey, scoped to the record-pebble flow.

nodes.title: Landing
nodes.description: Public landing page with app branding, login button, and create-account link. Redirects authenticated users to the home view. iOS (PR #281) implements this as WelcomeView: persistent logo header, auto-advancing 3-step carousel, and two CTAs that push AuthView with the correct mode preselected.

nodes.title: Login
nodes.description: Login page with username and password form. Redirects to path or onboarding based on profile completion status.

nodes.title: Register
nodes.description: Registration page with username, password, confirm password, and consent checkboxes (terms + privacy). Auto-logs in and redirects to onboarding on success.

nodes.title: Home
nodes.description: Main dashboard. iOS (#388) is now the post-auth root: horizontal weeks roll of cairns at top, paginated per-week pebble list (TabView page style) in the body, full-width 'New pebble' button and a custom bottom bar (glyph + bounce + karma) replacing the system tab bar. Glyph and stats push the Profile screen; Lab is reachable as a NavigationLink inside Profile.

nodes.title: Path
nodes.description: Week-paginated path of pebbles. Top: horizontal weeks roll of cairn animations centered on the focused week. Middle: date-range header with prev/next chevrons and a per-week scrollable list of pebble rows that pages horizontally between weeks. Bottom: in-view dock combining the quick pebble editor (collapsed as a 'What happened?' trigger; expanded as a bottom-sheet overlay) and a stats bar (profile glyph link, bounce, karma — all link to Profile).

nodes.title: Record Pebble
nodes.description: Capture a new memory with title and quick context.

nodes.title: Set Intensity & Valence
nodes.description: Adjust the intensity and emotional valence of a pebble.

nodes.title: Shape Emotion Pearl
nodes.description: Sculpt a nuanced emotion pearl for the pebble.

nodes.title: Attach Instants
nodes.description: Capture or select photos to attach as instants to the pebble during recording.

nodes.title: Link Soul
nodes.description: Associate one or more souls (people) with the pebble.

nodes.title: Attach Domain
nodes.description: Map the pebble to a life domain on the revisited Maslow pyramid.

nodes.title: Add Cards & Thoughts
nodes.description: Enrich the pebble with media cards and scoped written thoughts.

nodes.title: Quick Pebble Editor
nodes.description: Single-page pebble creation editor (V2) combining all enrichment steps. On /path the editor is anchored to the bottom dock — collapsed as a 'What happened?' trigger that opens an overlay bottom-sheet on tap; on /record it auto-opens as the route's primary affordance.

nodes.title: Pebble Detail
nodes.description: Read-only display of a recorded pebble: rendered shape, title, picture, emotion/domain/collections/souls metadata shown as shared tiles, and description. Edit button stacks the editor.

nodes.title: Pebble Revelation
nodes.description: Intermediate screen after save that reveals the generated pebble SVG visual for the first time, before transitioning to celebration.

nodes.title: Record Celebration
nodes.description: Celebration screen after revelation that confirms the pebble was saved, before navigating to the detail view.

nodes.title: Collections
nodes.description: Browse and manage all pebble collections.

nodes.title: Collection Detail
nodes.description: View a collection and its pebbles grouped by month; rename / re-mode / delete entry points.

nodes.title: Create Collection
nodes.description: Create a new collection to group pebbles.

nodes.title: Edit Collection
nodes.description: Rename or re-mode an existing collection. Web renders inline on the detail page; iOS presents as a sheet.

nodes.title: Souls Directory
nodes.description: Browse and manage all souls (people in your life) as a 3-column glyph grid.

nodes.title: Soul Detail
nodes.description: View a soul's profile and all linked pebbles.

nodes.title: Add Soul
nodes.description: Create a new soul entry for someone in your life.

nodes.title: Edit Soul
nodes.description: Rename an existing soul. Web renders inline on the detail page; iOS presents as a sheet.

nodes.title: Glyphs
nodes.description: Glyphs page with three tabs — Mine (glyphs I created), Owned (glyphs I swapped, my entitlements), and Commu (community marketplace, approved+listed, excluding my own). Mine keeps carve + rename; Owned/Commu open the swap/owned drawer.

nodes.title: Glyph Detail
nodes.description: View a single glyph with full SVG preview and metadata.

nodes.title: Carve Glyph
nodes.description: Draw a new glyph on a pebble surface using the carve editor.

nodes.title: Attach Glyph
nodes.description: Draw a new glyph or select an existing one to attach to a pebble during recording.

nodes.title: Bounce Tempo
nodes.description: View your bounce karma and regularity tempo.

nodes.title: Collection Rise
nodes.description: Track collection growth and level progression.

nodes.title: Achievements
nodes.description: Gallery of unlocked and upcoming achievements.

nodes.title: Weekly Cairn Intro
nodes.description: Introduction screen before reviewing the weekly wrap.

nodes.title: Weekly Cairn
nodes.description: Weekly wrap summarizing pebbles stacked into a cairn.

nodes.title: Weekly Cairn Review
nodes.description: Reflect on and confirm the weekly cairn.

nodes.title: Monthly Cairn Intro
nodes.description: Introduction screen before reviewing the monthly wrap.

nodes.title: Monthly Cairn
nodes.description: Monthly wrap aggregating weekly cairns into a larger cairn.

nodes.title: Monthly Cairn Review
nodes.description: Reflect on and confirm the monthly cairn.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Your life is a path
nodes.description: First onboarding screen introducing the pebble/path metaphor.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Drop a pebble, keep the moment
nodes.description: Second onboarding screen framing pebble recording as low-friction.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Qualify and relate
nodes.description: Third onboarding screen explaining emotion, domain, souls, collections.

nodes.title: Onboarding — Get your pebble
nodes.description: Fourth onboarding screen explaining glyph carving and pebble illustration.

nodes.title: Settings
nodes.description: Profile settings. iOS (#452): edit-mode sheet presented from Profile's gear button. Web: a dedicated /settings route reached from the Profile gear button, with a Save action enabled when dirty. Sections mirror iOS — header glyph (tap → glyph picker dialog), Informations (editable display_name, read-only email), Providers (read-only Apple/Google list for SSO accounts) or Password (new password field for email-only accounts), Legal (Terms, Privacy) — plus a web-only Appearance section (theme, language, colour world). Persists name+glyph via the profiles update (update_profile RPC on iOS) and password via auth.updateUser.

nodes.title: Profile
nodes.description: User profile dashboard. Banner (glyph + display name in the Reenie Beanie script face + member-since), a shortcuts row (Collections / Souls / Glyphs), a Stats card (ripple-level badge + 28-day assiduity grid + Days / Pebbles / Karma counters), a horizontal Collections carousel, a Lab card, and a logout button; a gear button opens Settings. Web aligns to the iOS token refactor (issues #465 / #467). iOS (#388): pushed from PathView's bottom bar; hosts the Lab navigation link and the onboarding replay full-screen cover.

nodes.title: Record Pebble
nodes.description: Core flow to capture a new pebble via the single-page Quick Pebble V2 editor with all enrichments inline.

nodes.title: Onboarding
nodes.description: New user onboarding journey ending with first pebble.

nodes.title: Manage Collections
nodes.description: Browse, create, and curate pebble collections.

nodes.title: Manage Souls
nodes.description: Browse, add, and view souls linked to your pebbles.

nodes.title: Manage Glyphs
nodes.description: Browse, carve, and view glyphs (shape-agnostic custom marks).

nodes.title: Weekly Wrap
nodes.description: Weekly cairn ritual to stack and review your week.

nodes.title: Monthly Wrap
nodes.description: Monthly cairn ritual to stack weekly cairns into a bigger cairn.

nodes.title: Gamification Hub
nodes.description: Access bounce tempo, collection rise, and achievements.

nodes.title: Account
nodes.description: User account with username and hashed password credentials.

nodes.title: Profile
nodes.description: User profile with display name, onboarding state, color world preference, and consent timestamps (terms_accepted_at, privacy_accepted_at).

nodes.title: Pebble
nodes.description: A single recorded memory with intensity, 3-level positiveness, visibility, and timestamp.

nodes.title: Emotion Pearl
nodes.description: Nuanced emotional shape attached to a pebble.

nodes.title: Soul
nodes.description: A person linked to pebbles, representing someone in the user's life. Each soul carries a glyph for visual identity.

nodes.title: Domain
nodes.description: Life domain from the revisited Maslow pyramid.

nodes.title: Card
nodes.description: Media or content card attached to a pebble.

nodes.title: Thought
nodes.description: Scoped written reflection tied to a pebble.

nodes.title: Collection
nodes.description: A curated group of pebbles with rise progression.

nodes.title: Bounce
nodes.description: User's regularity karma tracking engagement tempo.

nodes.title: Cairn
nodes.description: Weekly or monthly wrap stacking pebbles into a summary.

nodes.title: Achievement
nodes.description: Unlockable reward earned through collecting and engagement.

nodes.title: Instant
nodes.description: A compressed photo attached to a pebble, stored as a base64 JPEG data URI.

nodes.title: Mark
nodes.description: A glyph rendered into a pebble slot (shape-agnostic square), stored as SVG strokes. The is_custom flag (generated from user_id IS NOT NULL) distinguishes user-drawn glyphs from per-domain system seeds, and powers the % custom-glyph creativity signal in admin analytics.

nodes.title: GET /marks
nodes.description: Retrieve all user marks (glyphs).

nodes.title: POST /marks
nodes.description: Create a new mark (glyph).

nodes.title: DELETE /marks/:id
nodes.description: Delete a mark (glyph) by ID.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles
nodes.description: Create a new pebble record.

nodes.title: GET /pebbles
nodes.description: Retrieve pebbles with filters and pagination.

nodes.title: GET /pebbles/:id
nodes.description: Retrieve a single pebble with all enrichments.

nodes.title: PATCH /pebbles/:id/intensity
nodes.description: Set intensity and valence on a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/pearl
nodes.description: Shape and attach an emotion pearl to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/souls
nodes.description: Link one or more souls to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/domain
nodes.description: Attach a life domain to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/cards
nodes.description: Add a media card to a pebble.

nodes.title: POST /pebbles/:id/thoughts
nodes.description: Write a scoped thought on a pebble.

nodes.title: GET /souls
nodes.description: Retrieve all souls for the current user.

nodes.title: POST /souls
nodes.description: Create a new soul entry.

nodes.title: PATCH /souls/:id
nodes.description: Rename an existing soul.

nodes.title: DELETE /souls/:id
nodes.description: Delete a soul; cascades the pebble_souls join rows. Pebbles themselves are untouched.

nodes.title: GET /collections
nodes.description: Retrieve all user collections.

nodes.title: POST /collections
nodes.description: Create a new pebble collection.

nodes.title: GET /bounce
nodes.description: Retrieve current bounce tempo and karma.

nodes.title: GET /achievements
nodes.description: Retrieve unlocked and available achievements.

nodes.title: GET /cairns/weekly
nodes.description: Generate or retrieve the current weekly cairn.

nodes.title: GET /cairns/monthly
nodes.description: Generate or retrieve the current monthly cairn.

nodes.title: POST /auth/register
nodes.description: Register a new user account.

nodes.title: POST /auth/login
nodes.description: Authenticate an existing user.

nodes.title: POST /auth/logout
nodes.description: End the current user session.

nodes.title: GET /auth/session
nodes.description: Retrieve the current session.

nodes.title: GET /profile
nodes.description: Retrieve the current user profile.

nodes.title: PATCH /profile
nodes.description: Update the current user profile.

nodes.title: GET /collections/:id/rise
nodes.description: Retrieve rise progression for a collection.

nodes.title: Mechanic Sheet
nodes.description: Informational dialog explaining a gamification mechanic (pebbles, bounce, or karma).

nodes.title: Pebble Visual
nodes.description: Reusable SVG visual component rendering a pebble's generated glyph at multiple tiers (thumbnail, detail, revelation).

nodes.title: Pebble Engine
nodes.description: Pure TypeScript rendering engine that generates SVG pebble visuals from pebble data; designed for extraction as @pebbles/engine.

nodes.title: Docs Index
nodes.description: Public documentation index listing all legal and support pages grouped by category. Supports locale switching (EN/FR) and embed mode for iOS webview.

nodes.title: Docs Page
nodes.description: Individual documentation page rendering localized markdown content (privacy policy, terms, legal notice, credits). Supports locale switching and embed mode.

nodes.title: Legal Notice
nodes.description: Individual legal notice page rendered from localized markdown. Accessible without authentication.

nodes.title: Terms of Service
nodes.description: Individual terms of service page rendered from localized markdown. Accessible without authentication.

nodes.title: Privacy Policy
nodes.description: Individual privacy policy page rendered from localized markdown. Accessible without authentication.

nodes.title: Legal Consent
nodes.description: Registration consent flow: user accepts terms and privacy policy during signup via checkboxes linking to legal documents.

nodes.title: Lab
nodes.description: Living product-transparency view. Featured community card, then announcements, changelog (top 5 + see all), ongoing initiatives, and backlog (top 5 by upvotes). iOS (#388): no longer a tab; pushed from Profile's Discover section.

nodes.title: Admin · Analytics
nodes.description: Back-office analytics page (admin-only). Thin slice (PR #337): KPI strip (Total users, DAU, WAU, MAU, Pebbles/day, DAU/MAU) + Active users line chart with DAU/WAU/MAU toggle. Global time-range tabs (7d/30d/90d/1y/All) URL-driven via ?range=. Layout extension (#339): Active users chart shrinks to 8/12 and a Retention cohort heatmap (last 8 weekly signup cohorts) fills 4/12. Five other buildable surfaces (volume, enrichment, per-user, domain share, visibility, single-emotion share) follow on the same milestone (M28).

nodes.title: Admin · Glyph moderation
nodes.description: Back-office moderation queue for community glyph submissions (#497, M36 sub-project D). Admin-only. Status-filtered list (pending/approved/rejected) of submissions, each previewed as its shapeless square glyph. Approve (publishes to Market, optional price override), Reject (required reason stored in review_note, shown to the submitter), and Re-price approved listings. All mutations go through is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPCs; the queue reads via admin_list_glyph_submissions because the widened glyphs SELECT policy does not expose pending submissions' strokes to admins via RLS.

nodes.title: Admin · Upload glyph
nodes.description: Back-office authoring flow (#497, M36 sub-project D). Admin-only. Imports a raw SVG, parses it into the stroke-only glyph model (supported subset: path/line/polyline/polygon, commands M L H V Q C Z; fills/other elements skipped and reported), previews it as a shapeless square glyph, adjusts name/price plus scale/recenter/flip transforms (baked into geometry at publish), and publishes a first-party (admin-owned) community glyph via publish_admin_glyph.

nodes.title: Admin · Domains
nodes.description: Back-office domain management (#518). Admin-only. Lists every domain with its current glyph thumbnail; a per-domain editor edits name + description (the domains.label column) and uploads/replaces the domain's glyph. The glyph reuses the stroke-only SVG pipeline (svgToStrokes + scale/recenter/flip adjust baked into geometry) shared with the glyph uploader. Text edits update the DB fallback only — localized domain names/labels still come from the client i18n catalogs; the glyph is language-neutral and newly DB-sourced. All mutations go through is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPCs.

nodes.title: RPC admin_list_domains
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Returns every domain (id, slug, name, label, default_glyph_id) left-joined to its glyph geometry (strokes, view_box), ordered by name. The admin Domains list + editor read path.

nodes.title: RPC admin_update_domain
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Updates a domain's name and label (description); trims input and rejects an empty name (bad_name) or unknown domain (not_found).

nodes.title: RPC admin_set_domain_glyph
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Sets/replaces a domain's glyph in place: when default_glyph_id is null it inserts a system-owned (NULL user_id), shapeless glyph and links it; otherwise it overwrites that glyph row's strokes/view_box (same glyph_id — no orphans, and every consumer updates). Rejects empty strokes (empty_glyph) or unknown domain (not_found).

nodes.title: v_domains_with_glyph
nodes.description: Postgres view (security_invoker): one row per domain — id, slug, name, label, default_glyph_id — left-joined to its glyph's strokes + view_box. Domain glyphs are system-owned (NULL user_id) so they read under the widened glyphs SELECT policy. Web reads this via useDomainGlyphs to render each domain's glyph beside its name; also available to iOS.

nodes.title: RPC admin_list_glyph_submissions
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Returns submissions joined to glyph geometry (strokes/view_box/name) + submitter email, ordered oldest-first. The moderation queue's read path — bypasses the RLS gap that hides pending submissions' strokes from admins.

nodes.title: RPC approve_glyph
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Sets a pending submission to approved (live in Market), stamps reviewed_at/reviewed_by, with an optional price override.

nodes.title: RPC reject_glyph
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Sets a pending submission to rejected with a required review_note (surfaced to the submitter), stamping reviewed_at/reviewed_by.

nodes.title: RPC set_glyph_price
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Re-prices an approved listing. Existing entitlements' price_paid snapshots are untouched.

nodes.title: RPC publish_admin_glyph
nodes.description: is_admin-gated SECURITY DEFINER RPC. Atomically inserts a glyph owned by the admin + an auto-approved submission, publishing a first-party community glyph from an uploaded SVG.

nodes.title: glyphs
nodes.description: User-drawn (or admin-uploaded) glyph marks: stroke-only geometry (strokes JSONB of {d,width} + view_box), optional name, nullable user_id (NULL = system seed). Rendered recolored by emotion. SELECT widened (D8) to own ∪ seeds ∪ approved-listed ∪ entitled; UPDATE/DELETE locked once listed/bought (admin-exempt).

nodes.title: glyph_submissions
nodes.description: A community glyph submission and its market listing (#496). Columns: glyph_id, submitter_id, status (pending/approved/rejected), price, review_note (#497 admin reason), reviewed_at/reviewed_by. At most one active (pending|approved) submission per glyph.

nodes.title: v_analytics_kpi_daily
nodes.description: Postgres view: one row per calendar day from the earliest pebble's created_at to today. Columns: bucket_date, total_users, dau, pebbles_today, wau, mau, dau_mau_pct. Aggregates auth.users and public.pebbles. Plain (non-materialized) view; will swap to MV when query times warrant.

nodes.title: v_analytics_active_users_daily
nodes.description: Postgres view: projection of v_analytics_kpi_daily exposing bucket_date, dau, wau, mau. Backs the daily DAU/WAU/MAU line chart on the admin analytics page.

nodes.title: get_kpi_daily
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). Takes p_range ('7d'|'30d'|'90d'|'1y'|'all'). Returns the latest row of v_analytics_kpi_daily plus the row at (latest - period_length) for delta computation, plus the trailing 30 days for sparklines. Raises insufficient_privilege (42501) for non-admins.

nodes.title: get_active_users_series
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). Takes p_start and p_end dates. Returns rows from v_analytics_active_users_daily in [p_start, p_end] ordered ascending. Raises insufficient_privilege (42501) for non-admins.

nodes.title: v_analytics_retention_cohorts_weekly
nodes.description: Postgres view: one row per (cohort_week, week_offset). Cohort = users grouped by signup week (Mon–Sun, UTC) from auth.users.created_at. Columns: cohort_week, week_offset, cohort_size, active_users, retention_pct. retention_pct = % of cohort users who created >=1 pebble in that week_offset.

nodes.title: get_retention_cohorts
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). No arguments. Returns rows from v_analytics_retention_cohorts_weekly for the last 8 cohorts (most recent signup weeks). Raises insufficient_privilege (42501) for non-admins.

nodes.title: v_analytics_emotion_share_weekly
nodes.description: Postgres view: one row per (ISO week, emotion). Columns: bucket_week, emotion_id, emotion_slug, emotion_name, color, pebbles_with_emotion, total_pebbles, share_pct. Source: pebbles.emotion_id (NOT NULL FK), so each pebble counts toward exactly one emotion and share_pct sums to 100% per week.

nodes.title: v_analytics_domain_share_weekly
nodes.description: Postgres view: one row per (ISO week, domain). Columns: bucket_week, domain_id, domain_slug, domain_name, domain_label, domain_level, pebbles_in_domain, total_pebbles, share_pct. Source: pebble_domains many-to-many, so a pebble can be linked to multiple domains and shares may exceed 100%. domain_level is derived from the seeded Maslow slug order (zoe, asphaleia, philia, time, eudaimonia).

nodes.title: get_emotion_share
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). Takes p_start and p_end dates (week-truncated internally). Returns rows from v_analytics_emotion_share_weekly within the range, ordered by bucket_week asc, share_pct desc. The admin emotion-share card aggregates these rows for the snapshot view and renders them directly for the 12-week stacked-area over-time view.

nodes.title: get_domain_share
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). Takes p_start and p_end dates (week-truncated internally). Returns rows from v_analytics_domain_share_weekly within the range, ordered by bucket_week asc, domain_level asc. The admin domain-share card calls this RPC twice (current + previous period) to compute 'biggest movers' deltas in pp.

nodes.title: bounces
nodes.description: Postgres table: snapshot of each user's running bounce karma score. Columns: user_id (PK, FK auth.users), score (int, default 0; cumulative sum of karma_events.delta — may be transiently negative if reversals exceed gains, the analytics view floors at 0), updated_at. Maintained atomically by trigger karma_events_apply_to_bounce on every karma_events insert (upserts the delta in the same transaction). Backfilled at migration time from sum(karma_events.delta) per user. RLS: users can read their own row; writes only via the trigger (security definer).

nodes.title: v_analytics_bounce_distribution_today
nodes.description: Postgres view: histogram of users by current bounce score (six buckets: 0, 1-10, 11-25, 26-50, 51-100, 100+) plus three summary stats denormalized onto every row — median_score, pct_maintaining (% of users whose current bounce >= bounce 7 days ago, reconstructed from karma_events), avg_active_days_per_week (avg distinct active days in the last 7 days across MAU). Always emits all six bucket rows, even when empty.

nodes.title: get_bounce_distribution_today
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). No arguments. Returns the six histogram-bucket rows from v_analytics_bounce_distribution_today ordered by bucket_order asc. Backs the bounce karma distribution card on the admin analytics page. Raises insufficient_privilege (42501) for non-admins.

nodes.title: v_analytics_quality_signals_today
nodes.description: Postgres view: 8 rows describing today's habit-health indicators for the admin Quality signals table. Each row has indicator_order, indicator_key, indicator_label, unit, value (current period), previous_value (matching prior period), and available (false for the four indicators whose source data isn't captured yet — median session duration, sessions/WAU, % revisits to past pebbles, friction events/session). Phase A computes pebbles/WAU and D1 / D7 / D30 retention from public.pebbles + auth.users; the other four rows return null until sessions, pebble_views, and a normalized analytics_events table land in Phases B and C of issue #346.

nodes.title: get_quality_signals_today
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, gated on is_admin(auth.uid()). No arguments. Returns all eight rows from v_analytics_quality_signals_today ordered by indicator_order asc. Backs the Quality signals card on the admin analytics page. Raises insufficient_privilege (42501) for non-admins.

nodes.title: Emotion Category & Palette
nodes.description: public.emotion_categories table grouping emotions (anger, fear, joy, peace, pride, sadness, shame) with an inlined four-color palette: primary_color, secondary_color, light_color, surface_color (all 8-digit #RRGGBBAA). public.emotions.category_id NOT NULL FK joins to it. The view public.v_emotions_with_palette is an INNER JOIN of emotions and emotion_categories that clients consume to render pebble strokes (primary in light mode, secondary in dark) and the emotion meta pill (primary background, light foreground). Schema shipped in #367; iOS consumer in #369.

nodes.title: select v_emotions_with_palette
nodes.description: PostgREST select on public.v_emotions_with_palette. RLS open (select using true) — readable by any authenticated user. Returns ~38 rows × 11 columns: id, slug, name, color (legacy), category_id, category_slug, category_name, primary_color, secondary_color, light_color, surface_color. iOS consumes this once on app mount via EmotionPaletteService and caches in memory for the session.

nodes.title: Wallet
nodes.description: Karma wallet page at /wallet (M36, #494). Shows the user's spendable karma balance, total earned, total spent, a debt hint when the balance is negative, and a paginated credit/withdraw history list (fetched on demand, not part of the eager global load). Reachable from the karma stat in the Path bottom bar; back button returns to /path.

nodes.title: karma_events
nodes.description: Postgres append-only karma ledger. Each row carries a smallint delta plus a type axis (credit = earn-side: pebble_created/pebble_enriched/pebble_deleted/grant; withdraw = spend-side: purchase/refund), making karma a spendable currency. balance = Σ delta; earned = Σ delta where credit; spent = -Σ delta where withdraw. Inserts fire two triggers: apply_karma_event_to_wallet (all events) and apply_karma_event_to_bounce (credit-only, so the bounce snapshot stays earned-karma). Indexed on (user_id, type) and (user_id, created_at desc).

nodes.title: wallet_balances
nodes.description: Postgres table: per-user spendable karma balance snapshot. Columns: user_id (PK, FK auth.users), balance (int, default 0; may go transiently negative on earn-side clawbacks — no non-negative CHECK, the overdraw guard lives in spend_karma), updated_at. Maintained atomically by trigger karma_events_apply_to_wallet on every karma_events insert (credit and withdraw). RLS: users read their own row; writes only via the trigger (security definer). Backfilled at migration time from sum(karma_events.delta) per user.

nodes.title: spend_karma
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC (granted to authenticated). Guarded, race-safe karma debit: takes p_amount (positive), p_reason ('purchase'), optional p_ref_id. Locks the caller's wallet_balances row FOR UPDATE to serialize concurrent spends, raises insufficient_karma (P0001) when balance < amount, otherwise inserts a negative withdraw karma_events row — the trigger updates wallet_balances in the same transaction. Returns the new event id.

nodes.title: refund_karma
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER plpgsql RPC, execution restricted to service_role (revoked from authenticated to avoid a client-callable karma mint). Inserts a positive withdraw-side karma_events row reversing a prior spend; the trigger updates wallet_balances. Returns the new event id.

nodes.title: select v_wallet_summary
nodes.description: PostgREST select on public.v_wallet_summary, filtered to auth.uid() and granted to authenticated. Returns one row: balance (from wallet_balances) plus total_earned (Σ credit delta) and total_spent (-Σ withdraw delta) computed from karma_events. Backs the Wallet page summary card in one round-trip.

nodes.title: Karma Earned Flash
nodes.description: iOS-only delight surface (M36, #505) shown when a user earns karma by creating or enriching a pebble. Renders an in-app "liquid glass" pastille that pops up bottom-center (real .glassEffect on iOS 26, translucent-material fallback below), hosted in a pass-through overlay window so it floats above the create/edit/detail sheets. Shows a sparkle + "+N karma" with an accent-color countdown ring that drains over its ~2.5s lifetime; tap to dismiss. Fires a Core-Haptics vibration matched to a ceramic sound (sound only in ringtone mode, never interrupting other audio). Works on every device and iOS 17+ — the Dynamic Island is deliberately NOT used, because iOS won't render a foreground app's own Live Activity and karma is always earned by a foreground action. The "+N" amount is the exact server-computed delta returned as karma_delta by the compose-pebble / compose-pebble-update edge functions (read back from karma_events); delight-only, never authoritative over the balance. Non-positive deltas (deletions/clawbacks) stay silent. The ActivityKit/PebblesWidget stack is retained, unused, as the reference for a future Glyph-purchase Live Activity.

nodes.title: glyph_entitlements
nodes.description: Per-user glyph ownership grants from the marketplace: (user_id, glyph_id, price_paid, created_at). Written by buy_glyph; read by the Owned tab. RLS: caller sees only their own entitlements.

nodes.title: buy_glyph
nodes.description: SECURITY DEFINER RPC buy_glyph(p_glyph_id): atomically spends karma, inserts a glyph_entitlements row, and credits the creator, in one transaction. Raises insufficient_karma / not_in_market / already_owned / cannot_buy_own. Returns scalar jsonb { entitlement_id, balance }.

nodes.title: Glyph Swap Drawer
nodes.description: Community glyph swap drawer. Slide-to-confirm karma swap with rising haptics + pebble/bamboo sound; morphs SWAP → OWNED in place on success. Usage/owners/creator shown as placeholders until a detail RPC lands.

nodes.title: Swap Glyph
nodes.description: Swap a community glyph for karma: browse the Commu tab, open the swap drawer, slide to confirm, and the drawer morphs to the owned state.
